name: Evidence-Based Depreciation Recapture Reduction

eligibility.description: Taxpayers with adequate records showing they claimed less depreciation than the maximum permitted by law.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to use 'allowed' depreciation instead of 'allowable' depreciation for recapture calculations if they can prove the amount actually taken was lower.
